title: Excel Import - Name column replaced with a number
excerpt:
Hey, I’m just importing Excel file to the board. The Name column is set as a name of the Event, but after uploading the data, the name column displays the date and not the name. Any idea why? 
Thanks

posts.author: KinBW (Kinga)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey, I’m just importing Excel file to the board. The Name column is set as a name of the Event, but after uploading the data, the name column displays the date and not the name. Any idea why?

Thanks
